Localization.Description: A network API call on behalf of a process running from user's home directory

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} called network API using suspicious file {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to call network API using suspicious file {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host}
A network API call on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host} is detected
User {subject.account.name} called network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to call network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host}
A failed attempt to call network API on behalf of process {subject.process.name} run from user's home directory on host {event_src.host} is detected
